scripts.test: if [ -f ./node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs ]; then node ./node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run; else node ../../node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run; fi
scripts.typecheck: if [ -f ./node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc ]; then node ./node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc --noEmit; else node ../../node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc --noEmit; fi
